mapper.select: SELECT * FROM staff_leave WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted = 0 AND ( (start_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) OR (end_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) OR (start_date <= #{startDate} AND end_date >= #{endDate}) ) ORDER BY start_date

SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM staff_leave WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted = 0 AND ( (start_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) OR (end_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) OR (start_date <= #{startDate} AND end_date >= #{endDate}) )
